issues.title: Canary rollback under-specified
issues.resolution: Baseline = rolling 24h median; ≥5000 req + ≥20min per step; 3-consecutive 1-min breach windows; thresholds include absolute + ratio; 15min cooldown; promote requires 2× clean window.

issues.title: Prod smoke = staging only
issues.resolution: Added synthetic_prod_smoke tenant 5-min cadence; 3-region external HTTP vantage; post-deploy forced roundtrip per canary step.

issues.title: Outbox-same-tx invariant unenforced in CI
issues.resolution: New cilint rule outboxpair (AST) + contract test against sql/contracts/state_transitions.yaml; wired into invariants.yml as required check.

issues.title: Perf gate label-only
issues.resolution: Minimum perf suite auto-runs on touched approval/jobs/api paths; failure blocks unconditionally; needs-perf-full for extended tier.

issues.title: Migration range hardcoded
issues.resolution: Range discovered dynamically from filesystem glob; historical-file modification check via git diff-filter=M on every prior migration.

action_taken: All 5 fixes applied inline to Tasks 12.1, 12.2, 12.3, 12.4, 12.5. Round 2 skipped.
